Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 652}Hey, did you see them filming something in the city?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 652}I guess it's a really touristy spot. They must be used to seeing celebrities around here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 652}Did you check out the souvenir shop downstairs? 6HARA is a pretty weird name for it![n]{f 1 1}
